title: Intense Croatian Lamb Stew
description: A bitter, tender, indulgent stew that showcases lamb stock, shio-cure, and robust Croatian flavors.

ingredients.name: lamb shoulder
ingredients.notes: partially cured with shio for 2 hours

ingredients.name: lamb stock
ingredients.notes: use vegetable stock for vegetarian option

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until onion is translucent and fragrant.
Add cubed lamb shoulder and brown all sides, about 8 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste, carrots, celery, and rosemary, cooking for 2 minutes to develop flavor.
Pour in white wine, scraping the bottom to deglaze, letting it reduce by half.
Add lamb stock, bay leaves, and black pepper, bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 90 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender.
Remove bay leaves, check seasoning, and serve hot, optionally garnishing with fresh herbs.
